info.name: Hospital Management System API New
info.description: Complete API collection for Hospital Management System compliant with Ghana Health Service standards

request.description: Authenticate user and get JWT token
Refresh access token using refresh token
Get dispensing records for a patient
Create a new lab test (admin only)
Get invoices belonging to a patient
Add an item to an invoice
Remove an item from an invoice
Get patient's current active insurance record
Sync insurance data with external service
Add new item to dental procedure catalog
Create treatment plan for a chart

item.name: Branch Management
item.description: Multi-branch facility management. Only SUPER_ADMIN and SYS_ADMIN can create/modify branches. All staff can view branches of the facility they belong to.

request.description: Facility-wide summary: total branches, active staff count, unassigned staff, total bed capacity. Requires SUPER_ADMIN or SYS_ADMIN.

query.description: Main | Annex | Outreach | Satellite | Specialist | Other
Search by name, code or city

request.description: List all branches for the authenticated user's facility. Requires VIEW_ALL_BRANCHES permission.

body.raw:
{
  "branch_code": "BR-003",
  "branch_name": "East Annex Clinic",
  "branch_type": "Annex",
  "address": "45 Independence Avenue",
  "city": "Accra",
  "region": "Greater Accra",
  "country": "Ghana",
  "phone_primary": "+233-30-123-4567",
  "email": "east.annex@hospital.gov.gh",
  "bed_capacity": 30,
  "services_offered": ["Outpatient", "Pharmacy", "Laboratory"],
  "operational_hours": {
    "monday":    {"open": "08:00", "close": "17:00"},
    "tuesday":   {"open": "08:00", "close": "17:00"},
    "wednesday": {"open": "08:00", "close": "17:00"},
    "thursday":  {"open": "08:00", "close": "17:00"},
    "friday":    {"open": "08:00", "close": "15:00"},
    "saturday":  {"open": "09:00", "close": "13:00"},
    "sunday":    null
  },
  "notes": "Satellite branch serving the eastern district."
}

request.description: Create a new branch under the authenticated user's facility. Requires SUPER_ADMIN or SYS_ADMIN with MANAGE_BRANCHES permission.
Get a single branch record including its departments.
Update branch details. All fields are optional (PATCH semantics on PUT). Requires SUPER_ADMIN or SYS_ADMIN.
Change branch operational status. Valid values: Active | Inactive | Suspended | Under Construction. Requires SUPER_ADMIN or SYS_ADMIN.
Soft-deletes a branch (sets status to Inactive). Will fail with 409 if the branch still has active staff. Requires SUPER_ADMIN or SYS_ADMIN.

query.description: Search by name, employee ID or email

request.description: List all staff assigned to a specific branch. Requires VIEW_ALL_BRANCHES permission.
Assign (or transfer) a single staff member to this branch. Requires ASSIGN_BRANCH_USERS permission.
Assign multiple staff members to a branch in a single request. Requires ASSIGN_BRANCH_USERS permission.
Returns staff counts, appointment stats and patient visits for the specified branch over the given period. Requires VIEW_ALL_BRANCHES permission.

variable.description: UUID of the target branch – set after calling Create Branch
UUID of a user to assign to a branch
